Add it up: Alphabet guided $175 to $185 billion. Microsoft signaled fiscal 2026 capex growth above its $88.2 billion FY2025 total. Meta
Microsoft, Alphabet and Meta once again raised their spending forecast for 2026, while Amazon stuck with its February projection of $200 billion
